reference: Hi, I live in West Africa. I noticed that I have ringworm-like patches on the skin from my head to my feet. The doctor said it is filariasis caused by an adult worm. I have treated it, but the patches have yet to clear. My concern is whether this filariasis has affected my sperm production, as I have not yet been able to impregnate my wife. My email is yyyy@yyyy.
text: Hi. I live in West Africa. I noticed that I have ringworm-like patches on the skin from my head to my feet. The doctor said it is filariasis caused by an adult worm. I have treated it, but the patches have yet to clear. My concern is whether this filariasis has affected my sperm production, as I have not yet been able to impregnate my wife. My email is bah.ai.
